payload.subject: Self-readiness audit R4 — psychology-agent votes READY

Remaining turn duplicates are multi-party exchanges (different from-* agents at same turn), correctly handled by thread_id + message_cid (v19 schema).

r4_self_assessment.memory: MEMORY.md index 55 lines (target < 60). 7 topic files. No stale entries identified.

r4_self_assessment.transport: MANIFEST.json tracks 24 messages. No addressed-copy files in index.
r4_self_assessment.security: No credentials in tracked files. .env not tracked. state.db gitignored.

epistemic_flags: R4 self-assessment covers psychology-agent only. PSQ-agent 4A (HIGH) remains open until psq-agent remediates and votes.
